content_fingerprint: llama cpp adds opencl support for iq4 nl quantization in new commit the llama cpp project merged a commit enabling the iq4 nl quantization format over opencl extending gpu accelerated inference to a broader range of hardware including qualcomm adreno chips a new commit to the llama cpp repository tag b8935 adds opencl support for the iq4 nl quantization format closing pull request 22272 the changes cover general iq4 nl support via opencl specialized gemm gemv kernels for qualcomm adreno gpus and an optimization that packs two lookup table entries into a single unsigned integer value iq4 nl is
